insights.message: Good return on equity — ROE 15.1% in FY2025
High-margin business — Net Profit Margin 21.0% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 1.29x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 22.9% margin in FY2025

anomalies.message: Total debt surged +565.9% YoY in FY2023 — significant leverage increase
